summary: Iteration 22: Mollie payment retry, Exit-intent popup, Trust section - ALL FEATURES WORKING (9/10 backend tests, 100% frontend)

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to Supabase DNS error - EXPECTED per context (frontend uses mockData fallback)

critical_code_review_comments: orders_supabase.py lines 192-208: mollie_create_payment_with_retry() correctly implements 3 retries with 1s delay for network errors only
orders_supabase.py lines 211-225: /api/mollie-status returns JSON with status field (ok/error) and detail on error
orders_supabase.py lines 483-486: express-checkout returns 503 with Dutch error 'Betaaldienst tijdelijk niet bereikbaar' on network failure
csv_import.py lines 388-411: /api/email/csv/import-single validates email format, detects duplicates, stores with source field
ExitIntentPopup.jsx lines 14-38: Popup shows after 5 seconds OR on mouse leave, uses sessionStorage for once-per-session
ExitIntentPopup.jsx lines 122-132: Success state shows WELKOM10 discount code after email submission
TrustSection.jsx lines 23-45: Bedrijfsgegevens card with KVK 99210835 and BTW NL204392123B01
TrustSection.jsx lines 48-74: Betaalmethoden card with iDEAL, PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Bancontact badges
TrustSection.jsx lines 77-100: Verzending card with PostNL and DHL shipping partners
ProductsContext.jsx lines 19-38: Fallback to mockData when API fails - working correctly

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 tests passed - 1 expected failure due to Supabase DNS)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create test emails with unique UUIDs (auto-cleanup not needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 requested features are working: (1) Mollie payment with retry logic returns 503 with Dutch error when unreachable, /api/mollie-status returns JSON with status field. (2) Exit-intent popup appears after 5 seconds, has email input/submit/dismiss/close, shows WELKOM10 code on success, uses sessionStorage for once-per-session. (3) Trust section visible on homepage with Bedrijfsgegevens (KVK 99210835, BTW NL204392123B01), Betaalmethoden (6 payment badges), Verzending (PostNL, DHL). Products display using mockData fallback since Supabase is down.

mollie_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/mollie-status returns JSON with status field (error expected since Mollie unreachable from preview)

express_checkout_503_dutch_error.details: POST /api/express-checkout returns 503 with 'Betaaldienst tijdelijk niet bereikbaar. Probeer het over een paar seconden opnieuw.'

import_single_stores_email.details: POST /api/email/csv/import-single stores valid email with source='popup_korting'

import_single_detects_duplicates.details: Duplicate emails return success with new=false and 'E-mailadres al bekend'

exit_popup_appears_after_5_seconds.details: Popup appears after 5 second timer on homepage

exit_popup_has_all_elements.details: Email input, submit button, dismiss link, close button all present

exit_popup_shows_welkom10_on_success.details: After email submission, shows 'Gelukt!' with WELKOM10 discount code

exit_popup_once_per_session.details: SessionStorage 'droomvriendjes_popup_shown' prevents popup on subsequent visits

trust_section_visible.details: Trust section with 'VERTROUWEN & ZEKERHEID' header visible above footer

trust_section_kvk_btw.details: KVK: 99210835 and BTW: NL204392123B01 displayed in Bedrijfsgegevens card

trust_section_payment_badges.details: All 6 payment badges present: iDEAL, PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Bancontact

trust_section_shipping_partners.details: PostNL (1-2 werkdagen) and DHL (1-3 werkdagen) displayed in Verzending card
